description: The deep phalanx is an ancient Greek tactical formation developed by Theban general Epaminondas at the Battle of Leuctra (371 BCE).  A deliberate break from the standard hoplite phalanx depth (8 ranks) by deepening one flank to overwhelm the enemy.
tooltip: Hoplites gain +1 crush, +0.5 Hack resistance and 25 health but lose 5% walk speed
